data.title: [solidcore] Unveils 2026 Core Collective, Expanding Member Experience Through Leading Wellness Partnerships
data.description: A strength-training brand, [solidcore], based in Arlington, VA, has launched its 2026 Core Collective program, aimed at providing exclusive offers and experiences to its members. The initiative expands the brand's reach beyond the studio by collaborating with Celsius, KOIA, Salt & Stone, Thorne, and Tower 28. These partnerships offer a blend of in-studio and digital experiences to support members in their overall health journey. The program is designed to enhance member value and enrich the brand's impact, containing a curated selection of benefits for members.

data.title: Analyst: Market has factored in quantum risk for Bitcoin, suggests developers agree on upgrade path amid selloff.
data.description: Bernstein suggests that the recent decline in Bitcoin's price has already factored in the quantum risk, and highlights that there is still an opportunity for developers to reach a consensus on a post-quantum upgrade plan.

data.title: A-dec Donates $1 Million Legacy Gift to Dental Trade Alliance Foundation to Support Future Dental Professionals
data.description: A significant announcement was made in Arlington, Virginia on April 13, 2026, as The Dental Trade Alliance Foundation revealed a game-changing $1,000,000 donation from A-dec. A world-renowned manufacturer of top-tier dental equipment and solutions and a key member of the DTA, A-dec's generous endowment has paved the way for the establishment of the A-dec...

data.title: Quantiiv Introduces AI Decision Partner That Thinks Like a Restaurant Executive
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, a new artificial intelligence platform called Quantiiv is set to revolutionize the restaurant industry. Developed by individuals who have experienced the challenges of decision-making with limited data and ineffective analytics tools, Quantiiv aims to provide real-time guidance rather than just historical data. This platform is the first of its kind in the industry and is designed to function as a virtual executive for restaurant operators. With Quantiiv, operators can make high-stakes decisions with more accurate information and insights at their fingertips.

data.title: Bitcoin drops due to failed Iran talks, relentless selling pressure, and Morgan Stanley's increased crypto interest.
data.description: Over the weekend, the price of Bitcoin experienced a decline following the breakdown of negotiations in Iran and continued selling pressure. Simultaneously, Morgan Stanley indicated an increase in their interest and ambitions within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: SERVICETITAN ELITE TRADES CHAMPIONSHIP QUALIFYING OPENS FOR 2026
data.description: In Chicago, starting from April 13, 2026, the highly anticipated ServiceTitan Elite Trades Championship Series (SETCS) will commence. HVAC technicians and plumbers are gearing up to showcase their skills and compete for a whopping sum exceeding $120,000 in cash and prizes. Qualifying rounds for the competition open on the same day, welcoming tradespeople of various experience levels to participate in this prestigious event.

data.title: Felicitysolar to Showcase New 125kW C&I Energy Storage Solutions at Canton Fair 2026
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on April 13, 2026, there is a growing trend among commercial and industrial (C&I) energy users to enhance energy management. This is in response to challenges like escalating electricity prices, unstable grids, and mounting peak load demands. C&I users are keen on gaining better control over their energy usage amid these circumstances.
Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares, totaling $50,000.

data.title: Fortreum Acquires Kovr.AI to Deliver AI Done Right in Cybersecurity Compliance—Setting a New Standard for Audit Quality, Compliance Readiness, and Client Trust
data.description: In Lansdowne, Virginia, Fortreum, a prominent cybersecurity assessment and advisory firm supported by Gryphon Investors, disclosed the acquisition of Kovr.AI. Kovr.AI is a FedRAMP-authorized compliance platform tailored for industries with stringent regulations. The company's recent partnerships with various entities in the U.S. have garnered significant attention. Fortreum, known for serving top federal and commercial clients, aims to leverage Kovr.AI's AI-centric technology to enhance services further.
LME THREE MONTH COPPER HITS $12,974/T, HIGHEST SINCE MARCH 13, LAST UP 1.0%

data.title: Polyisocyanurate Insulation Manufacturers Association (PIMA) Publishes Updated Polyiso Industry-Averaged Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs)
data.description: New, independently verified Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs) offer detailed environmental impact information covering the entire life cycle for polyiso roof insulation, polyiso wall insulation, and HD polyiso roof cover boards. Released in Arlington, Virginia on April 13, 2026, these EPDs provide transparent insights into the sustainability of these products. The Polyisocyanurate Insulation Manufacturers Association presented these updated EPDs, showcasing the commitment to disclosing crucial data for informed decision-making. This move towards transparency is crucial as businesses and consumers increasingly prioritize sustainability.

data.title: symplr Names Venkat Kavarthapu Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Established leader in healthcare technology will aid in boosting the expansion of symplr's advanced software platform and promoting AI-driven innovation. The announcement was made on April 13, 2026, in Houston. symplr®, a key player in enterprise healthcare operations software with support from Clearlake Capital Group, L.P., is set to undergo this development.

data.title: SwitchBot Launches SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable
data.description: In Tokyo on April 13, 2026, SwitchBot, a top provider of AI-powered home robotics systems, introduced the SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable. This new version of the popular SwitchBot Bot aims to maintain the simplicity and adaptability that has made it a favorite. This launch signifies the company's commitment to innovation and enhancing the user experience.

data.title: Managed Technology Partner Expands in Lucas County, Creating Jobs and Boosting Local Economy
data.description: In Swanton, Ohio on April 13, 2026, a significant investment in Lucas County is expected to boost job creation and enhance the local infrastructure. This move aims to solidify the region as a leading center for logistics and technology services. Velocity, a Managed Solutions Company, is launching a new facility spanning 100,000 square feet.

data.title: Urban Outfitters Welcomes Sol de Janeiro to Its Growing Beauty Category, Deepening the Beauty Brand's Presence in Lifestyle Retail
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Urban Outfitters introduced Sol de Janeiro, a rapidly expanding beauty brand recognized worldwide for its indulgent body care products. This debut symbolizes a transition towards viewing beauty as a form of self-expression, a part of everyday rituals, and a pathway for exploration. Urban Outfitters acknowledges the significance of this trend towards embracing beauty as a means of personal expression.

data.title: Ernesta Opens Location on Long Island's Gold Coast
data.description: A custom rug brand, Ernesta, is broadening its presence to Manhasset, N.Y., to cater to the design community and consumers on Long Island's North Shore. The expansion reflects the company's commitment to offering high-quality, custom-sized rugs. This move, announced on April 13, 2026, demonstrates Ernesta's dedication to meeting the needs of customers in the region.
